para_trans: Vansatrao Naik Research and Training Institute (VANATI), Nagpur has been given the mandate to disburse funds under the Account Head 2225G 501, 31 Non-Payment Grants Directive for the financial year 2018.
Other Backward Classes Bahujan Welfare Department
Government Corrigendum No: PUMPAR-2025 / Q. No.197 (1) (E-1515667) / Sanstha Moti Mahal, 2nd Floor, 195, J. Tata Road,
Other Backward Classes Bahujan Welfare Department, Government Decision No. MAHAJYO-2023 / P.No.38 / Institutions / Dept. 08.10.2024.
2. Letter dated 04/03/2026 from Managing Director, Vansatrao Naik Research and Training Institute (VANARTY), Nagpur.
3. Government Memorandum No: PUMPAR-2025 / P.No. 197 (1) (E-1515667) / Institute D. 25.03.2026
The Government Memorandum in this regard Memorandum of 25.03.2026 Issue No. Line number 3 of 3: -
"Development, 01 - Vimukt Jati Nomadic Tribes, Other Backward Classes Welfare, (01) (09) Vansatrao"
"Vikas, 01 - Vimukt Jati Nomadic Tribes, Other Backward Classes Welfare, (01) (15) Vansatrao."
This government certificate is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
